content.speakerText: I need the budget report for the Q2 review—can you send it over?
content.speakerTextCn: 我需要Q2的预算报告进行复盘，能发我一下吗？
expectedAnswers: Sure, I'll email it to you in the next 10 minutes.
I'm finalizing it now—I'll share it as soon as it's ready.
I don't have it yet, but I'll follow up with Finance and get it to you by noon.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回应是否能提供资源，或说明下一步行动
语言准确性：使用恰当的动词如 send, share, follow up
表达自然度：符合职场沟通节奏，使用时间承诺（in 10 minutes, by noon）
关键词覆盖：使用了 budget report, send, share, follow up, Finance 等场景关键词
